case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC., VS. JOSEPH PENNANT et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT PENNANT, JOSEPH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENNANT, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 405 VALENCIA STREET, #105 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL APR-08-2008, IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT ABIDE WITH THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT, TERMS ARE STATED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Leona Luckett, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Arnold Walter Evje, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Joseph Pennant is present.
Linda Quinn representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 405 Valencia Street, #105 San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.
